Tests for colors.py and gamut.py (Oklab and sRGB gamut clipping).
Verify _cbrt handles negatives correctly and maintains gradient flow.
Verify sRGB <-> Linear RGB conversion is perfectly invertible.
Verify Linear RGB <-> OkLAB roundtrip for both in-gamut and out-of-gamut values.
Ensure gradients flow through OkLAB conversions even for negative RGB values.
Verify Halley's method denominator is clamped away from zero.
Verify the in-gamut boolean mask correctly identifies [0, 1] boundaries.
Verify max saturation and cusp calculations are finite and physically plausible.
Verify that pixels already in the sRGB gamut are returned completely unchanged.
Verify that out-of-gamut pixels are successfully projected into the [0, 1] range
Verify that gradients flow end-to-end through the gamut clipping process.
Ensure no NaNs or Infs are produced when processing extreme pixel values.
Verify that processing a batch yields the exact same results as processing items
Verify that gamut clipping correctly handles and preserves the alpha channel.
Tests for dataload.py (Image loading, OkLAB conversion, and dataset statistics).
Helper to create and save a dummy PIL image.
Helper to create a dummy ImageFolder-compatible directory structure.
Verify that all default normalization constants are lists of length 4.
Verify OkLAB conversion produces values in physically plausible ranges.
Verify basic loading returns (1, 3, H, W) tensor.
Verify target_size correctly resizes the image.
Verify color_space='oklab' correctly converts the tensor.
Verify normalize=True shifts the data and doesn't produce NaNs.
Verify custom mean and std override the defaults.
Verify loading with include_alpha=True returns (1, 4, H, W) tensor.
Verify .convert('RGB') safely handles RGBA and Grayscale images.
Verify that spatial coordinates add 2 channels.
Verify centered spatial coordinates map to [-1, 1].
Verify top-left spatial coordinates map to [0, 1].
Verify the full 6-channel pipeline (L, a, b, alpha, x, y).
Verify pipeline without alpha still returns 6 channels (L, a, b, alpha, x, y).
Verify that balancing and reverting is a lossless round-trip operation.
Verify RGB stats calculation on a uniform gray dataset.
Verify OkLAB stats calculation produces finite and plausible values.
Verify that changing batch size doesn't significantly alter the calculated stats
Complete test and debug of diffSLIC to ensure it works on any image.
Run diffSLIC on multiple image types and return results for visualization.
Converts integer labels to colored RGB via vectorized array indexing.
Verify diffSLIC doesn't produce NaN with all-zero (black) pixels.
Run diffSLIC with different hyperparameter configurations.
Verify p2s_assign sums to 1 over candidate dimension (softmax probability).
Check output tensor shapes for batch=2 with candidate_radius=1.
Check s2p_assign is None and outputs are finite when n_iter=0.
Verify spixel_upsampling restores original spatial resolution.
Verify gradients flow through the entire diffSLIC forward.
Check behaviour with a single superpixel (n_spixels=1).
Check diffSLIC works on non-square images (width != height).
Helper to create dummy valid neighbors for testing blocks.
Test KNN graph building for a single set of centroids.
Test KNN graph building for batched centroids.
Verify that Graph Q-Shift correctly shifts tokens along graph edges.
Verify CLS token is excluded from shifting and preserved.
Verify graph Q-Shift weights neighbors by distance.
Verify that v_first propagation affects block output.
Verify that block output depends on input content.
Verify that removal key (kk) and replacement key (kt) are decoupled.
Verify that the bonus term (r_k) is applied.
Test full backbone forward pass with hard superpixel mode.
Test full backbone forward pass if we manually change mode to soft.
Verify that the scattered output matches the original input resolution.
Verify that out_indices correctly returns features from multiple layers.
Verify CLS token handling and output.
Check for stability with larger grids (longer sequences).
Verify that ICLR (a) and Decay (w) are vector-valued and applied per-channel.
Verify the generalized delta rule state update formula.
Verify that same input produces same output.
Forward pass with random input produces all-finite outputs.
Scatter-to-original-resolution works regardless of img_size parameter.
Correct number of outputs for multiple out_indices.
CLS token output has correct shape when enabled.
Model with depth=1 and small config produces finite output.
Gradients flow back to the input tensor.
Same input produces same output across multiple forward calls.
Verify that spixel_size correctly scales the number of superpixels.
Verify that scatter_output=True restores original resolution.
Verify that num_superpixels can be overridden in the forward pass.
Regression tests for numerical stability and edge cases in Vision-RWKV-7.
Regression test for zero-norm division NaN bug with all-black pixels.
Regression test for NaN from softmax over all -inf with uniform image.
Verify full model forward pass with all-black input produces finite outputs.
Test with very few and very many superpixels to ensure stability.
Regression test for zero-norm division with single-channel input.
Forward pass with extreme pixel values should not break.
Two identical single-item batches should give same result as one batch of 2.
